heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 460m–7 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums (but not more than $10,804,000 for the acquisition of lands or interests in lands) as are necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1972— increased maximum amount authorized to be appropriated for acquisition of lands or interests in lands from not more than $7,000,000 to not more than $10,804,000.Pub. L. 92–272
amendments: Amendments1972— increased maximum amount authorized to be appropriated for acquisition of lands or interests in lands from not more than $7,000,000 to not more than $10,804,000.Pub. L. 92–272
